title: EverArt MCP via docker with an API-key env block → REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from modelcontextprotocol/servers-archived (src/everart/README.md, Docker variant). Verbatim except normalization to a valid JSON root. The EVERART_API_KEY value 'your_key_here' is upstream's own placeholder.

humanExpectation.rationale: A pinned docker image (mcp/everart) with an EVERART_API_KEY credential in the env block → secrets.env-key fires (medium, S2) → REVIEW. The credential is declared in the env block (contrast C049, where the inline -e form hits the ADR 0016 gap), so the secret IS flagged here. No bind mount, no unpinned package (docker image), no dangerous command. This pins a clean docker + env-secret REVIEW shape with the credential correctly surfaced from the env block.
knownLimitations: The env value is the upstream placeholder 'your_key_here'; CallLint reports the key NAME only (never the value).
